content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOURS LIKE 'J09C%'

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decision_table d2 WHERE d2.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

CREATE TABLE J09C_joined AS SELECT t.*, eab.Meter_reading_doc_no, n.TITLE, n.FORENAME, n.SURNAME, n.STREET, n.STREETNO, n.POST_CODE1, n.CITY1, n.CITY2, n.EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t JOIN eablg eab ON t.ANLAGE = eab.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09C_joined AS SELECT t.*, eab.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_Doc_No, n.TITLE, n.FORENAME, n.SURNAME, n.STREET, n.STREETNO, n.POST_CODE1, n.CITY1, n.CITY2, n.EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t JOIN eablg eab ON t.ANLAGE = eab.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.*, s.TITLE, s.FORENAME, s.SURNAME, s.STREET, s.STREETNO, s.POST_CODE1, s.CITY1, s.CITY2, s.EMAIL FROM J09C_joined t LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE (s.TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s.FORENAME IS NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) as TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) as FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) as SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) as STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) as STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) as POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) as CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) as CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) as EMAIL FROM J09C_joined t LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR WHERE s.TITLE IS NOT NULL OR n.TITLE IS NOT NULL

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) as TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) as FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) as SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) as STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) as STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) as POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) as CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) as CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) as EMAIL FROM J09C_joined t LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR WHERE s.TITLE IS NOT NULL OR n.TITLE IS NOT NULL

args.sql_query: SELECT `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final

args.email: Please find attached the processed data for J09C tour with meter readings and customer information. The data has been filtered according to the specified rules (KSA/EVU classification based on EQUNR count per HAUS, and prioritized sales data over net data).
